untranslatable_reason: The entry condition requires detecting swing highs and comparing momentum values across two peaks (bearish divergence pattern with strength parameter difference of 5). This requires swing detection and multi-bar momentum comparison logic that cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. The allowed indicator set does not include momentum indicators (e.g., ROC, momentum) needed to measure momentum at specific swing points, nor does it support the pattern recognition logic required to identify and compare consecutive swing highs.
translation_notes: Exit condition uses stoch_d_5 (smoothed fast stochastic on 0-100 scale) reaching 50 as specified. Entry conditions involving bearish divergence with swing high detection cannot be reliably translated to the available indicators without pattern recognition capabilities beyond the scope of simple threshold operators.
